blockingIssues.description: VAL-SETTINGS-004: Import test only checks page stability after import, does NOT verify data was actually restored. Should check that data appears in UI or via API.
VAL-SETTINGS-005: Invalid import tests only check page stability, not that error message is displayed. Should use expect(page.getByText(/error/i)).toBeVisible() or similar.
VAL-SETTINGS-STT-005: 'error message on failed reload' is not tested - no test simulates failed reload to verify error message display.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update validation contract for VAL-SETTINGS-STT-003 to reflect current implementation: no manual 'Reload Model' button exists - model auto-reloads on selection change
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: e2e-settings-stt-comprehensive review flagged behavior mismatch between contract and implementation

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit testable steps for VAL-SETTINGS-004 data restoration verification and VAL-SETTINGS-005 error message display verification
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Tests cover page stability but not functional outcomes described in contract
